# Generated by ollama (qwen2.5-coder_14b)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Set up Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v2
        with:
          node-version: '14'

      - name: Cache Node Modules
        id: cache-node-modules
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: |
            **/node_modules
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-modules-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-modules-

      - name: Install Node.js dependencies
        if: steps.cache-node-modules.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: npm install

      - name: Set up Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v2
        with:
          python-version: '3.8'

      - name: Cache Pip Packages
        id: cache-pip-packages
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: |
            **/__pycache__
            **/pip-cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-packages-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-packages-

      - name: Install Python dependencies
        if: steps.cache-pip-packages.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Cache Config Files
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: |
            **/config
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-config-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-config-

      - name: Run Build
        run: npm run build

      - name: Run Tests
        run: npm test
